description: Deke grows suspicious about the fate of his father when he discovers a monolith shard among Voss’s possessions. Pressing Voss for the truth, he concludes something isn’t right, leading to a violent confrontation where Voss knocks Deke out. Deke realizes Voss may be lying about what happened to his family, increasing the intrigue and distrust among the survivors.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: What are they doing with the shard?
Who, Coulson and May? Hell if I know, but if you ask me, they got their priorities way out of whack.
No, that's not what I mean. That belonged to my mom. Why doesn't my dad have it with him? After my mom died, he always kept it close. He wouldn't have left it behind.
Don't overthink it, kid. It's pretty dangerous out there in the wastelands. He probably just left it here for safekeeping.
No. Before the Blues exiled him, I begged him for that stupid rock so I'd have something to remember her by, and he said that he couldn't trust me with it.
No, you need to stop lying to me. He wouldn't leave it in your locker. So what the hell did you do to my father?
That box controls the entire floor. But the Blues shut the power off.
Not a problem. Fitz knows how to pack for any occasion. Come on. Beautiful. And Yo-Yo got us plenty of these.
You know that gas won't be enough to kill the Roaches, right?
Yeah, but it should be enough to drive them into one room.
Okay. Then what do we do?
Dial it back a notch, Pebbles.
